html:
Exclusive to:

Miss Sow's Floral Arrangements is a naturally spawning Pig Shop Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in Swinesbury Pig City and sells a variety of Plants and Farming materials to the player.

If the player obtains the Key to the City, Miss Sow's Floral Arrangements also becomes craftable in the City Planning Tab using four Boards, 12 Petals and four Pig Skins.

Contents

  • 1 Interior
  • 2 Decor
    • 2.1 Shelfs
    • 2.2 Pillar
    • 2.3 Windows
    • 2.4 Doors
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Interior

Upon entering Miss Sow's Floral Arrangements, the player will find a variety of Items that are sold in exchange for Oincs. A Florist Pig shopkeeper works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name
Dragon Fruit Seeds 10
Garland 2
Berry Bush 2
Pumpkin Seeds 1
Pomegranate Seeds 1
Eggplant Seeds 1
Durian Seeds 1
Corn Seeds 1
Watermelon Seeds 1
Birchnut 1
Pine Cone 1

Additionally, the following items can be bought from shelves which will not be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name Amount
Seeds 1 4

Decor

  • Wall Defect
  • Wall Defect
  • Wall Defect
  • Hangingplant Decor
  • Plant
  • Lattice Front
  • Lattice Front

Shelfs

  • Hutch Shelf

Pillar

  • Trellis Wall Corner
  • Trellis Wall Front

Windows

Doors

  • Exit

Trivia

  • Ms. Sow's Floral Arrangements could be a play on words based on the name and profession, a sow is a female pig and sowing seeds is the process of planting seeds.

Gallery

  • The interior of Miss Sow's Floral Arrangements.
  • Hangingplant Decor Old
  • Unused Burnt
  • Unused Burnt Broken
  • Unused Side
  • Unused Side
  • Unused Burnt
  • Unused Burnt Broken

“A garden variety shop.”
–Wilson
“For growing stuff.”
–Willow
“Is shop for little growing things.”
–Wolfgang
“Plants wither and die too.”
–Wendy
“FULL OF INFANT LIFEFORMS”
–WX-78
“This shop trades in local flora.”
–Wickerbottom
“I like this shop.”
–Woodie
“Every breastpocket needs a fresh rose.”
–Maxwell
“Materials for the cultivation of plants can be purchased within.”
–Wagstaff
“Freya's items are böught and söld within.”
–Wigfrid
“We can always use more seeds.”
–Webber
“I love that place.”
–Walani
“Ah! I do need help growing fresh vegetables.”
–Warly
“A house'o'land plants.”
–Woodlegs
“HATH SEEDS WITHIN”
–Wilba
“Has dirt things”
–Wormwood
“I prefer my seeds launched out the Pew-matic.”
–Wheeler

If the player obtains the Key to the City, Miss Sow's Floral Arrangements also becomes craftable in the City Planning Tab using four Boards, 12 Petals and four Pig Skins.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Sự sắp xếp hoa của Miss Sow là một Cấu trúc Cửa hàng Lợn sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy ở Thành phố lợn Swinesbury và bán nhiều loại Thực vật và Nguyên liệu trồng trọt cho người chơi.
title: Miss Sow's Floral Arrangements

'''Miss Sow's Floral Arrangements''' is a naturally spawning [[Pig Shops|Pig Shop]] [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in [[Pig City|Swinesbury Pig City]] and sells a variety of [[Plant]]s and [[Farming]] materials to the player.

If the player obtains the [[Key to the City]], Miss Sow's Floral Arrangements also becomes craftable in the [[City Planning Tab]] using four [[Boards]], 12 [[Petals]] and four [[Pig Skin]]s.

==[[File:Door (Ancient Pig Ruins Exit) Map Icon.png|32px]] Interior==
Upon entering Miss Sow's Floral Arrangements, the player will find a variety of [[Items]] that are sold in exchange for [[Oinc]]s. A [[Florist Pig]] shopkeeper works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:
